title: PDF Viewer tight sheet bounds
description:
PDF Viewer container now hugs the sheet stack with no side dead space. World bounds use page rectangles only (highlight lines no longer widen the viewport). Fit-to-width uses the full scroll width with zero margin.

Hard-refresh PipeSync after deploy (dbg59).

Who is affected: Private OVH server.
changeLog: Viewer bounds: page rects only, not highlight line extents.
Fit-to-width: zero margin, zoomport fills scroll width.
Normalize viewer layout on every render for correct sheet size.
